center.name: 阿普里马克大区
center.summary: 阿普里马克大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括高山斑䳍、须蜂鸟、Ash-breasted tit-tyrant等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: bolivianus is found in southeastern Peru's Cuzco and Apurímac departments and in La Paz Department in northwestern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes of central Peru from the Department of Junín south to Ayacucho and Apurímac departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: usheri is found in the basins of the Apurímac River and its tributary Pampas River in Ayacucho and Apurímac departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-fronted canastero is found in the Andes of south-central Peru's Huancavelica, Ayacucho, Apurímac, and Cuzco departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: griseipectus is found in the southern Peruvian departments of Apurímac, Cuzco, and Puno

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Peru's western Andes between southern Cajamarca and Ayacucho departments and in the country's central Andes between southern Amazonas and Apurímac departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The "eastern" nominate subspecies of bearded mountaineer is found in the departments of Apurímac and Cuzco of south-central Peru, in the drainages of the Urubamba and upper Apurímac rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (2008) | range_map = Nothoprocta taczanowskii map.svg }} Taczanowski's tinamou (Nothoprocta taczanowskii) is a type of ground bird found in the eastern Andes in Peru in the Junín, Cuzco, Apurímac, Ayacucho, and Puno Regions.Clements, J
